Hamdard Public School has been shaping students in Model Town since 1999, built on Hakim Muhammad Said's vision of quality education that stays within every family's reach.

Our Story
"Quality education is every child's right."

HPS was established inspired by the philosophy of Shaheed-e-Pakistan Hakim Muhammad Said, the same tradition behind Hamdard Foundation and Madinat-ul-Hikma. That vision still shapes how HPS teaches today: rigorous academics under the Cambridge and Matric curricula, delivered without putting quality education out of reach.

Model Town
4-J Model Town, Lahore

Campus Life

A school that shows up for its students

From daily wellness sessions to inter-city trips, HPS keeps students engaged well beyond the classroom.

Academics & Facilities

What a family gets with HPS

Built around the fundamentals that actually affect outcomes: curriculum, teachers, labs, and fees a Model Town family can plan around.

01

Cambridge & Matric Curriculum

Both tracks taught on one campus, so families choose the path that fits their child.

02

Experienced Teachers

A faculty that's guided classes from Nursery through Matric and O Level for over two decades.

03

Science & Computer Labs

Dedicated lab space for hands-on learning, not just textbook instruction.

04

Library & Event Hall

A newly added Event Hall now hosts assemblies, galas, and wellness sessions on campus.

Latest From HPS

Always something happening on campus

A few recent stories from the HPS newsletter.

Iqbal Week

Shaping Young Minds with Iqbal's Vision

Three days of skits, speeches, poetry, and a documentary screening exploring Allama Iqbal's philosophy, across every grade level.

Annual Gala

HPS Food & Art Gala

Food stalls, a magic show, a pets corner, and a fancy dress show, alongside large-scale art installations built entirely from student work.

LGS Optimus

46 Medals, 6 Shields, Runner-Up Overall

HPS delivered a standout performance at LGS Gulberg's annual sports fest, earning Best Delegation honours for the second time this year.
